description: Feature workflow — leader designs the WHAT (behavior), then plans the HOW; peers implement; leader verifies; docs updated. Behavioral-design, design-review checkpoint, plan, plan-quality-review, plan-review checkpoint, peer-handoff(implement), verify-plan, audit pipeline (includes test-coverage; leader writes missing tests in-line via the decision loop), run tests, update docs. Wire in agentwright:ui-design via a custom workflow if the feature has a UI surface.

phases.name: design-review
phases.summary: Design ready — behavioral-design.md (what happens, when, with what edges). User reviews. Resume to start HOW-level planning.

phases.name: plan-review
phases.summary: Plan + plan-quality-review findings ready. User reviews. Resume to dispatch implementation to peers.

phases.name: implement
phases.directive: Implement the plan in artifacts/plan.md. Decompose into independent tasks (per file scope or per implementation step) and dispatch to available peers. Run any tasks yourself if no peers are available.
